mapper.select: select count(1) from lc_elder_leave where status = 'approving'
select count(1) from bed where bed_status = '1' or bed_status = '2'
select count(1) from bed where bed_status = '0'
select count(1) from sys_user where sex = '0'
select date_format(check_in_time,'%m-%d') as date, count(1) as cnt from check_in where check_in_time between #{start} and #{end} group by date_format(check_in_time,'%m-%d') order by date
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(check_out_time, '%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM lc_retreat WHERE check_out_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(check_out_time, '%m-%d') ORDER BY date
SELECT lnl.level_name name, COUNT(cic.id) value FROM check_in_config cic LEFT JOIN lc_nursing_level lnl ON cic.nursing_level_id = lnl.id GROUP BY cic.nursing_level_id, lnl.level_name

SELECT CASE WHEN age < 60 THEN '60岁以下' WHEN age BETWEEN 60 AND 70 THEN '60-70岁' WHEN age BETWEEN 71 AND 80 THEN '71-80岁' WHEN age BETWEEN 81 AND 90 THEN '81-90岁' ELSE '90岁以上' END AS ageRange, sex, COUNT(*) cnt FROM elder GROUP BY ageRange, sex
SELECT project_name name, COUNT(id) value FROM lc_service_order WHERE project_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY project_name
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(payable_amount), 0) FROM lc_bill WHERE bill_type = 2
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(payable_amount), 0) FROM lc_bill WHERE bill_type = 1

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(pay_time, '%m-%d') AS day, IFNULL(SUM(order_amount), 0) AS amount FROM lc_service_order WHERE del_flag = 0 AND pay_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY day ORDER BY MIN(pay_time)

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(refund_time, '%m-%d') AS day, IFNULL(SUM(refund_amount), 0) AS amount FROM lc_service_order_refund WHERE del_flag = 0 AND refund_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY day ORDER BY MIN(refund_time)

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(execute_time, '%m-%d') AS day, COUNT(id) AS cnt FROM lc_service_order WHERE del_flag = 0 AND execute_time IS NOT NULL
AND execute_time >= #{startDate}
AND execute_time <= DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
GROUP BY day ORDER BY MIN(execute_time)
